name: Funding Readiness Scorecard FAQ
description: Public-safe questions and answers about the Am I Fundable Funding Readiness Scorecard.

mainEntity.name: Is the scorecard an approval or funding offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The scorecard is educational pre-qualification guidance only. It is not an approval, funding offer, commitment to lend, or guarantee of funding.

The scorecard reviews self-reported readiness signals such as revenue range, time in business, credit range, bank activity, business structure, funding purpose, requested amount, and common risk flags.

mainEntity.name: What happens after a user receives a score?

acceptedAnswer.text: The user receives a readiness tier, potential funding path categories, possible blockers, document-prep suggestions, and a recommended next step such as prep-first education or human review.

mainEntity.name: Does the scorecard expose funding providers?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Public pages describe funding categories and readiness guidance without exposing private provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, compensation data, or routing rules.
